title: Aklema gaumeri
taxonomy: Aklema gaumeri is a genus of flowering plants in the family Boraginaceae. Aklema gaumeri is classified as a species of flowering plant. It is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. Aklema gaumeri belongs to the order Lamiales. Further taxonomic classification places it as a member of the family Boraginaceae.
